productDisplayName: Turtle Men Formal Red Tie, Cufflink and Pocket Square Combo Set
description: Combo Set turtle's silk tie with its matching kerchief and crystal encrusted cufflinks instantly elevates your formal attire, with its luxe fabric and striking texture. One set of these to match your crisp shirt and you're all ready to suit up! Be it dinner dates or business meetings, this set is your fail-safe formal accessory option. Tie Length: 42.5" Red tie made of blended fabric Has diamond two tone patterning Loop on tie inner to hold end in place Cufflinks Width: 3" Matching square cufflinks made of steel with encrusted crystal Hinged back to hold the cufflink in place Pocket square Square handkerchief with a 10" width Made of blended fabric with a matching pattern Tie and pocket square care Dry clean only
